# claude-status

> Zero-dependency status line for Claude Code. Pure Python stdlib. 27+ metrics. 8 themes. All platforms.

## Install

```
pip install claude-status
claude-status --setup
```

## What It Does

Displays real-time session metrics in Claude Code's terminal status bar. Reads JSON from stdin (piped by Claude Code), formats 27+ data points across up to 2 lines, outputs ANSI-colored text to stdout. No daemon, no network calls, no background processes.

## CLI Commands

- `claude-status --setup` — interactive setup wizard (theme + budget)
- `claude-status --install` — auto-configure settings.json
- `claude-status --install --theme THEME` — install with specific theme
- `claude-status --uninstall` — remove from settings, restore previous config
- `claude-status --demo` — preview all 8 themes
- `claude-status --doctor` — run diagnostics
- `claude-status --version` — show version
- `claude-status --theme THEME` — use theme for this render only

## Themes

default, minimal, powerline, nord, tokyo-night, gruvbox, rose-pine, focus (single-line)

Custom themes: `~/.claude/claude-status-theme.json`

## Metrics Displayed

Line 1: context bar, tokens (in/out), cache %, cost, budget, burn rate, rate limits (5h/7d with countdown), context size, context warning
Line 2: duration, API latency, lines changed, git branch, git stash, git sync, git worktree, tool calls, sessions today, session name, vim mode, agent, worktree, model, output style, added dirs, effort level, version, CC version, clock

## Configuration Files

- `~/.claude/settings.json` — statusLine config (type, command, refreshInterval)
- `~/.claude/claude-status-budget.json` — daily_budget_usd, compaction_threshold_pct
- `~/.claude/claude-status-theme.json` — custom theme overrides

## StatusLine JSON Fields (from Claude Code stdin)

model.id, model.display_name, cwd, workspace.current_dir, workspace.project_dir, workspace.added_dirs, workspace.git_worktree, cost.total_cost_usd, cost.total_duration_ms, cost.total_api_duration_ms, cost.total_lines_added, cost.total_lines_removed, context_window.used_percentage, context_window.remaining_percentage, context_window.context_window_size, context_window.current_usage.*, exceeds_200k_tokens, rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage, rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at, rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage, rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at, session_id, session_name, transcript_path, version, output_style.name, vim.mode, agent.name, worktree.name, worktree.path, worktree.branch

## Architecture

cli.py (entry point, normalization, rendering) → bar.py (progress bar) + colors.py (ANSI) + formatters.py (tokens, cost, duration) + git.py (branch, stash, sync with 5s cache) + sessions.py (session count, tool count, budget, effort with 10-30s cache) + themes.py (8 built-in + custom)

## Key Design Decisions

- Zero external dependencies (pure Python stdlib)
- Never crash — degrade gracefully on any malformed input
- File-based caching with TTLs (5s-60s) to avoid subprocess overhead
- Responsive layout adapts to terminal width (120+/80-119/<80 cols)
- All numeric fields use _first() helper (not `or`) to preserve zero values

## Testing

stdlib unittest only. 210+ tests. CI: 3 OS x 7 Python versions (3.8-3.14).

```
python -m unittest discover tests/
```

## Links

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/claude-status/
